hero.title: I *help* founders turn *ideas* into seamless digital experiences

about.title: About
about.intro: A developer who builds *intelligent systems* and turns ideas into **real products**.
about.description: A *full-stack, ML & LLM-focused* builder; shipping **production apps**, **intelligent RAG pipelines**, and **AI security tools** — driven by **hands-on experimentation** and ***scalable thinking***.
about.current_work: Recently shipped **ViGiL.dev**, a deployed AI-powered vulnerability detection system using CodeBERT, ChromaDB, RAG and LLaMA 3. Previously **interned at Senchola Technologies and TrichyCoworks**, shipping a production Android app in Kotlin and automating workflows with n8n.
about.full:
I have been actively involved in software development for the past few years, mostly improving myself through my own projects. Turning an idea into a working product is the part I enjoy the most.

I mainly work in web development. I have built projects using technologies such as React, Next.js, Node.js, Express, and Laravel, working on both frontend and backend. I also gained experience in data management with MongoDB and PostgreSQL. Additionally, I developed desktop applications using C# and WinForms, and more recently started experimenting with lightweight modern desktop apps using Tauri (Rust).

Depending on the need, I also work with different tools. For example, I have built projects involving media processing using FFmpeg. I enjoy exploring new technologies, and I generally believe the best way to learn something is by using it directly.

In my projects, I don't consider it enough for something to just "work"; I try to keep things as clean, understandable, and maintainable as possible. When I face a problem, instead of quickly moving on, I prefer to dig into it and understand how it actually works.

My current goal is to work on larger, real-world impactful projects and further improve myself, especially in backend development and system design.

projects.intro: Real code. Real deployment. A curated set of systems spanning *full-stack web*, *Android*, and *AI* — each one built to solve **something**.

items.title: ViGiL.dev
items.description: A deployed AI-powered vulnerability detection system using CodeBERT, ChromaDB, RAG and LLaMA 3.

items.title: EVAC PLATFORM
items.description: A comprehensive platform designed to facilitate coordination and management during war-zone evacuation scenarios.

items.title: FinCheck
items.description: A comprehensive expense tracker mobile application built for Android to help users securely manage their personal finances.

items.title: Trendmeter
items.description: A robust stock chart analyzer designed to track, visualize, and analyze market trends efficiently.

roadmap.description: A roadmap of my software journey — the technologies I've learned, the systems I've shipped, and the problems I've solved along the way.

items.description: Wrote my first lines of code in Python at Care International School, Trichy. Learned the fundamentals of programming logic, object-oriented thinking, and problem solving. The foundation everything else is built on.

Continuing at Care International School, Trichy — moved into web development, building interfaces with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript while learning Python for scripting and automation. First time turning code into something people could actually see and use.

Joined SRM Institute of Science and Technology for B.Tech Computer Science. Completed a summer internship at Trichy Coworks — gaining early exposure to professional work environments, startup culture, and cross-functional collaboration. Continued building foundations in full-stack development alongside.

Interned at Senchola Technologies — shipped a production Android app in Kotlin and deployed a workflow automation system using n8n for real business operations. Started exploring AI/ML fundamentals through PyTorch and transformer architectures.

3rd year at SRM, CGPA 9.0. Built and deployed CodeGuard AI — an AI-powered vulnerability detection system using CodeBERT, ChromaDB, RAG pipelines, and LLaMA 3. Expanding into Angular 20, TypeScript, and cloud infrastructure. Holding AWS Cloud Foundations and AWS ML Foundations certifications. Actively seeking internship roles across Chennai, Bangalore, Hyderabad, Kochi, and remote.

contact.description: Whether we start fresh to bring a project to life or take an existing system further.
